title: Lab 10 — Extension Interfaces (CNI, CSI, CRI)
description: Kubernetes plugs into the host via three standard interfaces: CRI, CNI, and CSI.

steps.title: Step 1: CRI — talk to the runtime directly
Step 2: CNI — where the network plugin lives
Step 4: Trace a pod through all three interfaces
